name: Crockpot Curried Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Lean beef round, trimmed of fat and cut into 2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cornstarch and cold water in a crock pot. No pre-browning of the meat or preheating of the cooker is needed. Cover tightly and set on slow heat. Cook for 16 to 18 hours, or until meat is very tender. Gently stir the meat once or twice during cooking time.
2. Twenty or thirty minutes before serving time, stir the cornstarch into cold water and then stir this mixture into the crock pot. Cover and continue to cook at the lowest heat, stirring once or twice, until the liquid thickens. Serve with dollops of yogurt, lemon wedges, and chopped fresh parsley or cilantro leaves as a garnish, if desired. Makes 8 servings, 175 calories each.
VARIATION: Crock Pot Curried Lamb - Substitute lean lamb stew meat for the beef.
